name: ogreverse-brainrot-prism
description: A no-dependency browser creature-collecting RPG prototype with local MMO/PvP support.

scripts.check: node --check game.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check shared/battle-engine.mjs && node --check tools/smoke-game-data.mjs && node --check tools/smoke-mmo-api.mjs && node --check tools/launch-audit.mjs
scripts.prelaunch: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run launch-audit
